reference: My doctor said I have pneumonia and a low white blood cell count. Please read? I hope it's not Human Immunodeficiency Virus? My doctor said I have pneumonia and my white blood cell count is a little low; the range was three point eight to ten point eight for my white blood cells. What could be causing this? The only conditions I have are seizures, asthma, muscle aches, and Herpes Simplex Virus type one. Could it be Human Immunodeficiency Virus? I heard it lowers your white blood cell count.
text: A doctor said I have pneumonia and a low white blood cell count. Please read. I hope it's not human immunodeficiency virus. A doctor said I have pneumonia and my white blood cell count is a little low. The range was 3.8 to 10.4 for my white blood cells. What could be causing this? The only conditions I have are seizures, asthma, muscle aches, herpes simplex virus type 1. Could it be human immunodeficiency virus? I heard it lowers your white blood cell count.
